randomValue(int, int) - Static method in class net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.util.math.RandomHelper
Note that the 2 integer values have the following meanings: first integer is the lower bound, second integer is the upper bound.

All Paxelerate colors
redefinePathLayout() - Method in class net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.agent.Agent
When there is a new path found, this method cuts the old path up to the current point so that there is no overlapping with the new path but instead a matching complete path.
REGIONAL_VALUE - Static variable in enum net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.AircraftType
